overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city. The journey begins along a canal under an overpass, crosses a busy intersection, and continues down a commercial street lined with holographic billboards and elevated highways.

agents.ego_description: following two characters along the canal path, maintaining steady pace behind them

notable_agents.action: character in white outfit walking ahead along the canal path
character in blue coat with green hair walking ahead

entered.detail: murky water canal running parallel to the walkway, bordered by concrete walls
massive concrete highway overpass creating partial cover overhead
silver metal railing separating walkway from the canal drop
large military-style green truck parked along the curb
bright pink neon sign with lingerie advertisement glowing on building facade

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a massive concrete overpass alongside a murky canal. The path is bordered by a metal guardrail on the left and parked vehicles on the right. Two characters walk ahead - one in white and one in a blue coat with distinctive green hair. Neon signs glow against the shadowed environment, with a prominent pink lingerie sign visible on the right.

events.description: exits covered canal walkway into open sunlit intersection
crosses the street and turns right onto a new commercial street

agents.ego_description: navigating through the intersection, crossing the street with other pedestrians, then turning right

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab waiting at the intersection
pedestrian in gray jacket with yellow sleeves crossing the street

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the road
multi-story brick building with large windows and ground floor shops
vertical blue neon sign reading HOTEL on building corner
elevated highway ramp visible in the distance against the skyline

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered canal into bright sunlight at a busy intersection. The character crosses the asphalt crosswalk marked with yellow stripes, passing a yellow taxi and various pedestrians. A prominent blue neon hotel sign marks the corner building. After crossing, the character turns right onto a new street, leaving the canal area behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with elevated highway overhead

events.description: pedestrian density increases briefly as passing multiple NPCs on the narrow sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the green bike lane, passing various pedestrians and street vendors

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with purple hair and dark coat walking toward camera

entered.detail: distinctive bright green painted pedestrian and bike path along the street
traditional red paper lanterns hanging on wires across the street
wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art tagging
large holographic and digital billboards advertising various products

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow commercial street beneath an elevated highway that casts striped shadows across the green bike lane. Red paper lanterns hang overhead between buildings, mixing traditional decor with futuristic holographic billboards. The graffiti-covered wall on the right contrasts with the clean commercial facades on the left. Various pedestrians pass by in both directions as traffic moves along the adjacent road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a shadowed urban canal into a bright city intersection and finally down a narrow, neon-lit commercial street. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass alongside a murky canal, following two characters past parked vehicles and glowing pink neon signs. As the camera emerges from the cover of the overpass, the environment opens into the bright sunlight of a busy intersection where the character crosses yellow-striped asphalt past a yellow taxi and a blue hotel sign. The scene then shifts as the character turns right, moving beneath an elevated highway that casts striped shadows across a green bike lane. Finally, the path leads deeper into a commercial corridor where red paper lanterns and holographic billboards hang above graffiti-covered walls and passing pedestrians.
